name: Cron-job.org API
description: REST API for managing cron jobs on cron-job.org. Allows creating, updating, deleting, and viewing cron jobs and their execution history. Default rate limit: 100 requests/day (5,000 for sustaining members). Per-endpoint limits: 5 req/sec for reads, 1 req/sec for creates.

apis.name: Cron-job.org API
